basics.name: Tirth Parekh
basics.title: Business Systems Analyst @ Kitchen Concept | Analytics & Automation | Requirements Gathering • SQL • Data-Driven Solutions | Databricks Accredited - Generative AI Fundamentals
basics.summary: Hello, I'm Tirth Parekh, a Business Analyst & Developer who bridges business goals with technical execution. I specialize in requirements gathering, process documentation, workflow design, and converting business needs into efficient, scalable solutions. At Pinnacle Software Solutions, I support full SDLC delivery, focusing on clean code, debugging, and optimization to ensure systems are stable, secure, and long-lasting. My approach combines analytical thinking with technical clarity to deliver real business impact. Pursuing a Master’s in Business Analytics at Sacred Heart University, building on a strong foundation in Business and IT Management from Sardar Patel University. Skilled in Excel, SQL, and Tableau, I combine analytical techniques with business insight to deliver data-driven recommendations and operational efficiency. Passionate about transforming raw data into clear insights that support strategic decision-making and organizational growth.

bullets: Improved insurance claim processing systems by optimizing performance, fixing bottlenecks, and enhancing workflows for claims, policy servicing, and customer onboarding.
Built automated reports, dashboards, and integrated external data sources to enable accurate risk assessment, fraud detection, and data-driven decision-making.
Collaborated with product managers and technical teams while maintaining high code quality and recommending workflow enhancements to streamline claim settlements.
Collected and analyzed financial data to identify trends, enhancing decision-making processes.
Supported budgeting and forecasting efforts, ensuring alignment with actual financial performance.
Conducted comprehensive research on industry trends and competitors, identifying investment opportunities.
Collaborated with finance teams to prepare insightful financial presentations for senior management.
Assisted in the preparation of comprehensive reports and dashboards using Excel, SQL, and Tableau, enhancing data visibility.
Conducted in-depth research on industry trends and competitors, providing actionable insights for strategic planning.
Identified inefficiencies in business processes, recommending improvements that increased operational efficiency by 15%.
Supported project planning and documentation, ensuring timely implementation and testing of new business solutions.
Streamlined data collection and reporting procedures, achieving a 20% reduction in processing time.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to define project scopes and align with business objectives.
Conducted comprehensive market research, identifying over 10 key trends that informed strategic decisions.

achievements.context: Increased operational efficiency by identifying inefficiencies in business processes and recommending improvements.
Reduction in processing time achieved by streamlining data collection and reporting procedures.
Key trends identified through comprehensive market research that informed strategic decisions.

education.degree: Bachelor of Business Administration - Information Technology Management, Business Management

certifications.name: Career Essentials in Business Analysis by Microsoft and LinkedIn
Complete Guide to Power BI for Data Analysts by Microsoft Press
Claude with Google Cloud's Vertex AI
